apps.label: DOPE Projected Feed Colorama APK
apps.description: Bundled public DOPE projected-feed multi-layer Colorama runtime. The current public companion mirrors install, launch, device-profile, and scene-profile staging for this APK while the Astral-style live twin and hotload bridge is being wired into the Unity runtime.

bundles.label: DOPE Public Stack
bundles.description: Bundled projected-feed Colorama runtime plus the curated device and scene profile set used by the public DOPE operator app.
